name: HMS HDML 1070 (ML 1070)
events: 11 Apr 1944 HMS Ursula (Lt. A.G. Davies, RN) conducted gunnery exercises off Dundee with HMS ML 229 (T/Lt. W.C.R. Walsh, RNVR) and A/S exercises off Methill with HMS ML 201 (T/Lt. G.T. Bruce, RNVR) and HMS HDML 1070 (T/Skr. J. Clark, RNR). (1)
17 Jul 1945 HMS Truant (Lt.Cdr. R.S. Brookes, DSO, DSC, RN) conducted night snort trials off Leith during which she was escorted by HMS HDML 1070 (T/Skr. J. Clark, RNR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
